description_long: This is a two-story brick house with a flat, dark-colored roof and a rectangular footprint. The front facade features a central entry door with a small overhang, flanked by symmetrical windows and bordered by low, dark fencing and small green patches. The rear of the house opens onto a spacious backyard with a patio area, a grill or outdoor kitchen, and a large lawn, all enclosed by a tall, dark fence. The side views reveal the brickwork pattern and the extension of the backyard, with one side showing a paved area and the other a green patch. The windows are arranged in a regular, symmetrical pattern on both floors, and the house is surrounded by a fenced yard, providing privacy and separation from the urban environment. The overall design is modern and functional, with clean lines and minimal decorative elements.
description: A modern, two-story brick house with a flat roof, symmetrical windows, and a fenced yard featuring a patio and lawn. The front has a central entry with an overhang, while the rear opens to a spacious backyard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry door with an overhang, symmetrical windows, and low fencing with green patches.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the brickwork, fenced yard, and a glimpse of the backyard patio and lawn.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the large backyard with a patio, grill, lawn, and tall fencing.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the brickwork, fenced yard, and the extension of the backyard with green and paved areas.
attribute_entryway_design: Central door with a small overhang, flanked by windows and bordered by low fencing and green patches
